platforms.name: YouTube Shorts
platforms.mvp_route: YouTube Data API or manual CSV export
platforms.notes: Use publishedAfter, relevanceLanguage=ru, regionCode=RU, type=video, videoDuration=short; Shorts detection remains approximate.

platforms.name: TikTok
platforms.mvp_route: Apify or TikTok Research API where access is available
platforms.notes: Official research access is restricted; Apify can be faster for MVP, but platform limits and legal/ToS risk must be reviewed.

platforms.name: Instagram Reels
platforms.notes: Often depends on login/cookies and rate limits. Keep as phase 2.

platforms.name: VK Clips / Dzen
platforms.notes: Use after YouTube/TikTok proves the pipeline.
